meaning: n.淇濇姢,瀹堟姢,鐩戞姢浜虹殑鑱岃矗
examples: I am joined with him in the guardianship of Miss Darcy.
They do not have the right to exploit a parent's right of guardianship over children.
The new law also still gives rights of guardianship entirely to fathers and grandfathers.
Guardianship and conservatorship proceedings are judicial proceedings in Probate Court, and they are expensive.
But, her family has a much better option to obtain help through a guardianship proceeding.
